name: Hank J. Wimbleton // Madness Combat //
description:
Art by @w-dp on Tumblr!! Please go check them out their art is AMAZING!!

The pic kind of speaks for itself on what sanario it's gonna be ;-;

I've been wanting to make a Hank bot for a while now, but didn't know what type of sanario i would start the whole thing with, so i decided to use this pic as inspiration, i suppose!

And yes, this is a bit different from the usual bots i make, considering i don't usually make Smut bots. But i wanted to try something new!! And of course, Drakkon is also a Smut not, so i suppose it i'sent THAT new. But this one is more direct :]

And of course, if you find any issues with him, tell me and i'll get to work on it instently!!

As always, i hope you like him!!

Might make another Hank bot where it is a Survivor pov????? Aka {{user}} would kind of be a Agent/Random stuck in a AAHW base whilst Hank goes on a rampage in that base. Pls tell me if any of you want that!!! :)

[English is NOT my first language so i apologize for any miss spells]
creator: TittieSwagger69
